name: Apricot Ginger Conserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the apricots.
2. Add water, ginger, orange and lemon juice, grated orange rind, and grated lemon rind to a large pot.
3. Stir until well mixed.
4. Bring to a simmer over medium heat, stirring frequently.
5. Simmer slowly until thick and clear.
6. Remove from heat and add chopped nuts.
7. Cook for an additional 5 minutes.
